'''Harravan''' was a [[Hapan]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who had kidnapped and murdered [[Kalen (Hapan)|Kalen]], [[Isolder]]'s older brother. After spending nearly two years on the fringe, the [[Prince/Legends|prince]] tracked down and arrested him with the purpose of interrogating the pirate to find out who had hired him; however, Harravan was found dead in his jail cell before he could be questioned. Isolder later accused his mother, [[Queen Mother]] [[Ta'a Chume]] of hiring the pirate to kill her son and later having him killed.

==Behind the scenes==
Some sources refer to this individual as '''Haravan'''.
